name: The RAPP Cave
soul_summary: The public batcave — a cubby neighborhood anyone can pull from. Each member's cubby houses their full rapp estate, isolated. No collaborator gate, no gh auth: plain curl / fork + PR.
join_via: Public front door — anyone can browse and pull. Join = fork kody-w/RAPP, add a cubby under cave/cubbies/<login>/, open a PR. No collaborator access or GitHub auth required to consume.
notes: Public discovery beacon for the RAPP Cave. Distribution is plain curl / GitHub Pages — no gh auth, no collaborator gate. Faithful public mirror of the private rapp-batcave cubby-neighborhood, flipped to public.
